name: detectors: a11y-axe.sh emits findings whose messageId.data includes WCAG 2.2 section id (§1.3.1, §2.4.7, §4.1.2)
command: mkdir -p src && printf "\n" > src/a.tsx && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/detectors/a11y-axe.sh" --json --paths "src/**/*.tsx" 2>out.json && grep -E "wcag.*1\.1\.1|1\.3\.1|2\.4\.7|4\.1\.2" out.json 1>&2 && echo ok 1>&2
